title: Missing You
description: Exploring missing someone and personal connection.
lyrics: Hey, every time I'm sitting there missing you, I'm missing every time that we roll and we be cool, man, it's my crew, it's what we gonna do, I'm telling you I'm missing you tonight, every time I say it right, every time I do it like this way, I'm going each way, I'm going this way, this way, this way, can't you hold me back, man, I miss when things were easier, I miss when things were alright, I miss when you used to hold me down, shit, tuck me in at night, I miss when I was a parental moment, wish tonight could be all that and all the way, cause I get lost in reality and I can't find a door in this maze, I just wanna get lost in the feeling, I'm feeling, I'm feeling with you, yeah, get lost in the feeling, I'm feeling when I'm free with you, I get lost, I'm feeling that right in front of me, hey, feeling that world in front of me, ooh, you know what I'm saying, can you hear the music in your heart from the moment that you fear, fear from the moment that you fear, from the moment that you fear, this is the light right under your brain, past what they call insane, all here for us to name and rearrange, us to name, better, brighter day, cause when the world looks so fucking clear, it feels like you can't, can't ever care, like the whole thing was worth it, holding in your skin, then I stopped, I missed the ways to look twins, the world was less like this and more, more like this, yeah, talk to me, teach me something we should learn, talk to me when you think this world isn't something we should learn, we should love our life forever, we won't try to fight us against each other, you know, we can find hope and peace where we grow, against each other, you know, come together, it's just a level of beauty in the world, it's just a level, it's just a level, it's just a level, just a level of beauty in the world, just a level of beauty, just a level, just a level of beauty, just a level of beauty, just a level of beauty, talk to me like lovers do, talk to me
